title: Department Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Books - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Books - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Flipkart Books:
Flipkart Books is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
